# Rules for src-tauri/src/commands/cli.rs

<!-- Generated by proofd. Source: src-tauri/src/commands/cli.rs. Do not edit manually. -->

## Rust Command Modules (rust-command-modules)

- [RC-02] build_claude_args -- SessionConfig -> CLI args (--resume, --session-id, --project-dir, etc.)
- [RC-05] detect_claude_cli / check_cli_version / get_cli_help -- CLI discovery. spawn_blocking + CREATE_NO_WINDOW compliant.
- [RC-09] discover_builtin_commands / discover_plugin_commands -- Slash command discovery. Two-step binary scan (name:"..." positions + forward/reverse brace-bounded window for descriptions). Filters: skips /-- prefixed names, skips descriptions containing 'tab ID' or 'DOM', requires cmd length 4-30 chars. Deduplicates by command name.
- [RC-16] read_claude_binary(cli_path) resolves Claude Code binary through 5-step chain: .cmd shim parse -> direct CLI path -> sibling node_modules -> legacy versions dir -> npm root -g. Enables slash command/settings discovery on standalone installs.

## Respawn & Resume (respawn-resume)

- [RS-05] Skip `--session-id` CLI arg when using `--resume` or `--continue`

## Rust System Command Modules (rust-system-command-modules)

- [RC-18] Plugin management IPC: plugin_list (claude plugin list --available --json), plugin_install (--scope), plugin_uninstall, plugin_enable, plugin_disable. All async with spawn_blocking + CREATE_NO_WINDOW (via run_claude_cli helper). Raw JSON passthrough for plugin_list; string result for mutations.

## Config Schema and Providers (config-schema)

- [CM-03] Project directory selector: when multiple working dirs exist across sessions, the config modal header shows a dropdown to switch between project-level scopes. settingsSchema.ts builds the schema; fetch_settings_schema provides the Rust backend.
